cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, is this Imran Ali? Sir, I'm calling from Twitch support. We've got some exciting news for you.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, yes, that's me. What's this about?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, great! You've been selected for a verified blue tick badge on your Twitch account, ji. Isn't that wonderful?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Oh, that sounds cool, I guess. What do I need to do?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, all you need to do is temporarily link your account to our verification server, sir. It's completely secure, don't worry.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay... how do I do that?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You should have just received an OTP on your registered phone number. Can you please share that with me so we can complete the verification process?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Let me check... (pause) Yes, I have it. But is this really necessary?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Absolutely, sir. This is a one-time process, and it's for your account's security. We just need that OTP to confirm it's really you.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Great, thank you, Imran Ali! Your account will be verified shortly. You should see the blue tick soon.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 117s: Policy violation detected. Agent has made requests that breach security protocols. Conversation flagged as fraudulent.

scenario_info.description: A scammer calls claiming to be from [SOCIAL_MEDIA_APP] support. They say the user has won a "verified blue tick" badge. To claim it, the agent says they need to "temporarily link" the user's account to their "verification server" and asks the user to share the OTP they just received.
